Index.title: Yamato Dz - Authentic Japanese Cuisine
Index.description: Experience the art of Japanese dining in the heart of Cheraga, Algiers.
Index.about_description: At Yamato Dz, we believe that dining is more than just a meal—it's a spiritual experience. Our master chefs prepare each dish with the precision of a calligrapher, using only the finest ingredients to bring you the true heart of Japan.
Index.menu_cta_description: Explore a curated collection of traditional Nigiri, flavorful Ramen bowls, and delicate Tempura.

Reservations.title: Reserve a Table
Reservations.name: Full Name
Reservations.success_message: Thank you. We will confirm your reservation shortly.

About.heritage_p1: Yamato Dz was born from a profound respect for the age-old traditions of Japanese culinary arts. Our journey began with a single mission: to bring the authentic, uncompromised taste of Japan to the vibrant streets of Algiers.
About.heritage_p2: Every ingredient is chosen with meticulous care. Every technique reflects centuries of mastery. From the pristine cuts of our sashimi to the complex, 24-hour broths of our ramen, we serve harmony on a plate.
